mapper.sql: select issue_id, issue_code, issue_title, source_type, source_warning_id, warning_level, region_name, responsible_unit_name, responsible_person, supervisor_name, deadline, issue_status, indicator_id, indicator_name, current_value, threshold_value, issue_description, rectification_result, review_opinion, attachment_url, dispatch_time, submit_time, review_time, archive_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_rectification_issue
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
AND (issue_title like '%' || #{issueTitle} || '%' OR issue_code like '%' || #{issueTitle} || '%')
AND issue_status = #{issueStatus}
AND warning_level = #{warningLevel}
AND region_name like '%' || #{regionName} || '%'
AND responsible_unit_name like '%' || #{responsibleUnitName} || '%'
order by create_time desc, issue_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into nc_rectification_issue (issue_code, issue_title, source_type, source_warning_id, warning_level, region_name, responsible_unit_name, responsible_person, supervisor_name, deadline, issue_status, indicator_id, indicator_name, current_value, threshold_value, issue_description, rectification_result, review_opinion, attachment_url, create_by, create_time, remark) values (coalesce(#{issueCode}, 'ISS-' || to_char(current_timestamp, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), #{issueTitle}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceWarningId}, #{warningLevel}, #{regionName}, #{responsibleUnitName}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{supervisorName}, #{deadline}, #{issueStatus}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{currentValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{issueDescription}, #{rectificationResult}, #{reviewOpinion}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_rectification_log (issue_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, handle_by, handle_time, handle_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{issueId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionName}, #{handleBy}, #{handleTime}, #{handleOpinion}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select log_id, issue_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, handle_by, handle_time, handle_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_rectification_log where issue_id = #{issueId} order by handle_time, log_id
select issue_status as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_rectification_issue where del_flag = '0' group by issue_status order by issue_status
select coalesce(region_name, '未填地区') as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_rectification_issue where del_flag = '0' group by coalesce(region_name, '未填地区') order by count(1) desc
